creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
Would you visit this affordable luxury spa in South Korea?🇰🇷🛁

#travel #SouthKorea #Seoul #incheon #vacation

transcription.text: This might be the best spa that I've ever been to, but the price was the part that actually shocked me. They start you off on the first level, which has a giant pool with swings, hot tubs infused, tubing water slides, a digital spa with a DJ booth, a bar, an outdoor heated pool and hot tubs, and a steam room. Making our way to the second level, you'll find 10 unique sauna rooms, each with different themes and temperatures, an ice room, fitness rooms, relaxation rooms, a restaurant, personal cabanas, and an elevated infinity pool overlooking the resort. Finally, on the third level, you have the blue and purple lagoons and more heated rooftop pools. All of this for 6 hours costs only about $45. This is Simmer Spa in Incheon, South Korea.
